userMessage: Save all 4 channels as binary waveforms and take a screenshot

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side verified common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side from verified commands.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"3","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH2 waveform","params":{"source":"CH2","filename":"ch2.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"4","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH3 waveform","params":{"source":"CH3","filename":"ch3.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"5","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH4 waveform","params":{"source":"CH4","filename":"ch4.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"6","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"7","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
